name: I'm a Celebrity... South Africa
overview: Fifteen former I’m a Celebrity campmates return to take on South Africa, an even harder proposition that will push them to their limits and test them like never before in bigger and tougher challenges, and a harsher and more unforgiving environment as they compete against each other to become the first ever 'I'm A Celebrity Legend'.

trailers.title: Meet the Stars returning to Camp| I'm A Celebrity... South Africa
